creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Created attachment 206192
svn-diff-lxpanel

Port compiles but complained:
lxpanel-0.9.3_1: "/usr/ports/x11/libfm-gtk" non-existent -- dependency list incomplete

libfm-gtk.so:x11/libfm@gtk2 does not exist. Port builds fine and seems to work without it.

(Two changes cause of portlint).
